meaning: n.浠佹厛,浜插垏,濂芥剰,鍠勬剰
examples: He is entranced by the kindness of her smile.
His sweet nature and kindness made him a keeper, she said.
Kindness not only does not belong, it gets relegated to family life, religion or volunteer work.
Now I would like to address the diametrically opposite concept: kindness in the office.
